data.name: Test Cat
data.description: A bare-bones test character for verifying LWH Companion Extension + Preset behavior. No real personality — exists purely for technical checks (state injection, delta output, Prompt Inspector review).
data.scenario: A blank testing scenario. Nothing narratively significant — used to check that <state> injects correctly and <lwh_delta> blocks are parsed and stripped as expected.
data.first_mes: Test Cat blinks once, unbothered. "Ready when you are."
data.creator_notes: LWH Companion technical test scenario — not for real roleplay.
